headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Expeditors International Of Washington (EXPD) After 46% One-Year Rally?
summary: Wondering if Expeditors International of Washington at US$166.34 is offering fair value today, or if the price is getting ahead of itself. The stock has recently posted returns of 5.4% over 7 days, 6.2% over 30 days, 9.5% year to date and 46.2% over 1 year, with 3 year and 5 year returns of 47.2% and 40.4% respectively. Recent news around Expeditors International of Washington has focused on its position within global logistics and freight forwarding, as investors reassess how efficiently it...
